Psionic Screech.name: Psionic Screech
Psionic Screech.trigger: The user uses a Flying-Type Move
Psionic Screech.effect: The Move is changed to be the Psychic Type. Any targets hit by the attack are Flinched.

Toxic Nourishment.name: Toxic Nourishment
Toxic Nourishment.effect: The target is cured of their Poison and the user gains 3 ticks of Temporary Hit Points.

Ball Fetch.name: Ball Fetch
Ball Fetch.trigger: A Pokémon is Released onto the battlefield
Ball Fetch.effect: The user may move up to their speed as a Free Action. They must end this movement closer to the triggering Pokémon.

Chilling Neigh.name: Chilling Neigh
Chilling Neigh.trigger: The user causes a foe to Faint with a
Chilling Neigh.effect: The user’s Attack is raised by 1 Combat Stage. In addition, all foes within 3m of the user take a -2 penalty to evasion for one full round.

Cotton Down.name: Cotton Down
Cotton Down.trigger: The user is hit by an attack
Cotton Down.effect: All Pokémon in a Burst 1 around the user have their speed lowered by 1 CS, and are Slowed for one full round.

Curious Medicine.name: Curious Medicine
Curious Medicine.effect: All allies within 2m of the user have their CS reset to their default values. Special: The user may instead trigger this as a Free Action Reaction when entering the field.

Dauntless Shield.name: Dauntless Shield
Dauntless Shield.effect: The user’s default Defense Combat Stages are increased by +1.

Dragon’s Maw.name: Dragon’s Maw
Dragon’s Maw.trigger: The user hits with a damaging Dragon-Type
Dragon’s Maw.effect: One target hit by the attack becomes one stage more vulnerable to the attack (applied after all other modifiers). Immune targets are treated as initially double-resistant for the purposes of this Ability, and may be damaged normally.

Ice Face.name: Ice Face
Ice Face.effect: Connection – Aromatic Mist. All allies affected by Aromatic Mist gain +1 to Accuracy Rolls and +5 to Damage Rolls for one full round.

Gorilla Tactics.name: Gorilla Tactics
Gorilla Tactics.effect: The user gains a +10 bonus to damage rolls until the end of the Scene, including on the triggering Move. However, until the end of the Scene, they may only use Moves that they have already used in this Scene before triggering this Ability (the triggering Move is included in those usable).

Grim Neigh.name: Grim Neigh
Grim Neigh.trigger: The user causes a foe to Faint with a
Grim Neigh.effect: The user’s Special Attack is raised by 1 Combat Stage. In addition, all foes within 3m of the user take a -2 penalty to Accuracy for one full round.

Gulp Missile.name: Gulp Missile
Gulp Missile.trigger: The user uses Stockpile, Surf, or Dive
Gulp Missile.effect: Connection – Stockpile. The next time the user is damaged, it rolls an AC 4 Physical Attack against the attacker, even if the user Faints. On a hit, the target loses 2 ticks of HP. In addition, if the hit roll was successful, on an even roll the target is Paralyzed; on an odd roll, the target instead loses 1 Defense CS.

Hunger Switch.name: Hunger Switch
Hunger Switch.effect: At the beginning of each of the user’s turns, the user must choose whether it’s in Full Belly Mode or Hangry Mode until the beginning of its next turn. In Full Belly Mode, it gains a +2 bonus to Accuracy. In Hangry Mode, it gains a +5 Bonus to Damage Rolls.

Ice Scales.name: Ice Scales
Ice Scales.effect: The user resists Special Moves one step further. Defensive.

Intrepid Sword.name: Intrepid Sword
Intrepid Sword.effect: The user’s default Attack Combat Stages are increased by +1.

Mimicry.name: Mimicry
Mimicry.effect: The user changes their Type to match the field. Pick one type from the following table. If two or more rows are relevant (such as because of Weather), pick one. Field/Weather Type Beach Ground or Water Cave Rock or Dark Desert Ground or Rock Forest Grass Fresh Water / Ocean Water Grassland Normal or Grass Marsh Water or Poison Mountain Rock or Ground Rainforest Grass or Poison Taiga Ice or Grass Tundra Ice Urban Normal or Steel Sunny Fire Rainy Water Hailing Ice Sandstorming Rock Your GM may provide additional options should they choose (for instance, an Ethereal Forest may provide Psychic and Fairy options.) Note: This table may be used for Camouflage, too.

Perish Body.name: Perish Body
Perish Body.trigger: A foe’s Move or Ability directly lowers the
Perish Body.effect: The user’s CS are instead not lowered, and the triggering foe’s CS in the affected stats are instead lowered the same amount the user’s would have been.

Missile Launch.name: Missile Launch
Missile Launch.effect: Connection – Dragon Darts. The user places two Dreepy Tokens within 6m. The user may move all Dreepy Tokens it controls 4m as a Swift Action. A Dreepy Token can freely enter other creatures’ squares as part of this movement, which destroys the token, and causes the creature to suffer an AC2 DB 5 Physical Dragon-Type attack as if from the user of Missile Launch. Dreepy Tokens may be targeted. They have the same evasions as the user, and any damage destroys them (including from Smite damage).

Neutralizing Gas.name: Neutralizing Gas
Neutralizing Gas.effect: Abilities may not be Triggered in a burst 1 around the user, and Defensive abilities do not function in that area (the user is unaffected by this). If the user uses Poison Gas, Smog, Clear Smog, or Strange Steam, targets hit by those Moves may not trigger Abilities or benefit from Defensive Abilities for one full round.

Pastel Veil.name: Pastel Veil
Pastel Veil.effect: The user and allies within 3 meters cannot be Poisoned or Badly Poisoned. Defensive.

Power Spot.name: Power Spot
Power Spot.effect: Allies within 2m of the user gain a +5 bonus to damage rolls.

Propeller Tail.name: Propeller Tail
Propeller Tail.effect: The user may make a Sprint Maneuver as a Free Action.

Punk Rock.name: Punk Rock
Punk Rock.effect: The user gains +2 DB to moves that have the Sonic keyword.

Quick Draw.name: Quick Draw
Quick Draw.trigger: A foe uses a Move, and the user has not
Quick Draw.effect: The user immediately uses a Move on the triggering foe as a Standard Action Interrupt (this Move must still obey Frequency and Range). If this Move hits, the foe also gains a -2 penalty to their attack roll for the triggering attack, unless the foe cannot Flinch.

Stalwart.name: Stalwart
Stalwart.effect: Any numeric benefits of Berry Food Buffs the user trades in are doubled. (Oran Berries restore 10 HP, Liechi increases Attack by +2 CS, Jaboca causes ¼ Hit Point loss, Occa Weakens a Move 2 stages, etc.). This does not increase the number of statuses cured, Scene Moves restored, stats lowered by suppressants, or allow triggering at double the usual HP one must be at.

Sand Spit.name: Sand Spit
Sand Spit.trigger: The user is damaged by an attack from a foe
Sand Spit.effect: Connection – Sand Attack. The user attacks the triggering foe with Sand Attack as a Free Action.

Steam Engine.name: Steam Engine
Steam Engine.trigger: The user is hit by a damaging Fire-Type or
Steam Engine.effect: Connection – Smokescreen. The user may use Smokescreen as a Free Action, ignoring frequency, centered on the user.

Unseen Fist.name: Unseen Fist
Unseen Fist.trigger: The user hits with a damaging Electric-Type
Unseen Fist.effect: The user may pick a Move from their Mount’s known Moves that they do not already know. For the rest of the user’s Turn, they may use that Move as though it was one of their own Moves. Note that this does not remove any frequency limitations – a Daily Move that the Mount knows may not be used more than once. This Ability may not be copied or transferred.

Wandering Spirit.name: Wandering Spirit
Wandering Spirit.trigger: The user is hit by a Melee attack
Wandering Spirit.effect: The user exchanges Wandering Spirit with a random Ability of the opposing Pokémon, as per the Move Skill Swap.

Zen Snowed.name: Zen Snowed
Zen Snowed.effect: The user changes into Zen Mode forme for the rest of the Scene, and may use the Moves “Ice Punch” and “Fire Punch” as if they were on its Move List.

Klutz.name: Klutz
Klutz.trigger: The user hits with a Melee Attack
Klutz.effect: Choose one of the target’s Held Items or Accessory Slot Items. It is knocked to the ground.

Minus.name: Minus
Minus.trigger: A foe within 10m has Combat Stages lowered
Minus.effect: The target loses an additional Combat Stage in one stat lowered by the triggering effect.

Plus.name: Plus
Plus.trigger: An ally within 10m has Combat Stages raised
Plus.effect: The target gains an additional Combat Stage in one stat raised by the triggering effect.

Anchored.name: Anchored
Anchored.effect: Dhelmise has an Anchor token on the field, which occupies one square as if it is Medium sized but is otherwise ignored for cover and targeting. Dhelmise cannot move or be moved more than 3 meters away from its Anchor, willingly or otherwise. The Anchor token itself cannot be pushed, pulled, or moved against Dhelmise's will in any way. Dhelmise may shift their Anchor Token as a Swift Action, moving it to any open space within 3 meters of itself.

Battery.name: Battery
Battery.effect: The target's next Special Attack deals +2d6+4 damage. If that attack is Electric-Typed, it deals +3d6+6 more damage instead.

Beast Boost.name: Beast Boost
Beast Boost.trigger: The user’s Damaging Attack causes an
Beast Boost.effect: The user receives +1 Combat Stage in their highest non-HP stat.

Berserk.name: Berserk
Berserk.trigger: The user’s drops to half HP or below for the
Berserk.effect: The user receives +1 Special Attack Combat Stage.

Electric Surge.name: Electric Surge
Electric Surge.effect: Connection – Sweet Scent. Whenever the user hits a male target with Poison Gas, Smog, Sweet Scent, Toxic, or Venom Drench, that target becomes Infatuated with the user.

Comatose.name: Comatose
Comatose.effect: The user falls Asleep, and regains a Tick of Hit Points.

Corrosion.name: Corrosion
Corrosion.effect: The user's Poison-Type attacks are resisted one step less, and deal damage to Immune targets as if they were doubly resisted. The user may Poison and Badly Poison Steel and Poison-Type Pokémon.

Dancer.name: Dancer
Dancer.trigger: Someone within 10 meters uses a StatusClass Dance Move
Dancer.effect: The user may immediately use the triggering Move as a Free Action.

Dazzling.name: Dazzling
Dazzling.effect: For the rest of the Scene, the target's Initiative is lowered by 10 and cannot use Priority Moves.

Emergency Exit.name: Emergency Exit
Emergency Exit.effect: When the user’s Hit Points drop below half their maximum, their trainer may immediately recall the user and send out another Pokémon as a Free Action. If the user hasn’t taken their turn yet, their replacement may act this round. Defensive.

Fluffy.name: Fluffy
Fluffy.effect: The user resists damaging Melee attacks one step further, but resists Fire-Type attacks one step less. Defensive.

Full Metal Body.name: Full Metal Body
Full Metal Body.effect: The user’s Combat Stages may not be lowered by the effect of foes’ Features, Abilities, or Moves. Status Afflictions may still alter their Combat Stages. Defensive.

Galvanize.name: Galvanize
Galvanize.trigger: The user uses a Normal-Type damaging
Galvanize.effect: The Move is changed to be Electric-Type.

Glisten.name: Glisten
Glisten.effect: The user is immune to Fairy-Type attacks. Defensive.

Disguise.name: Disguise
Disguise.trigger: The user is hit by a Damaging Move.
Disguise.effect: The triggering attack instead misses and has no effect. The user then gains +1 CS in a Stat of their choice. Defensive.

Grassy Surge.name: Grassy Surge
Grassy Surge.effect: The Field becomes Grassy, as if affected by the Move Grassy Terrain, for one full round.

Misty Surge.name: Misty Surge
Misty Surge.effect: The user may hold two Held Items at once. Whenever an Ability or Move affects the user’s Held Items, you may choose which one is affected.

Horde Break.name: Horde Break
Horde Break.trigger: The user changes from School Form to Solo
Horde Break.effect: The user is cured of all Status Conditions.

Innards Out.name: Innards Out
Innards Out.trigger: The user is hit by a Damaging Attack
Innards Out.effect: The user resists the triggering attack one step further. After the attack is resolved, a foe within 2 meters loses Hit Points equal to twice the amount of Hit Points lost by the user from the triggering attack, even if the triggering attack caused the user to Faint.

Liquid Voice.name: Liquid Voice
Liquid Voice.trigger: The user uses a Move with the Sonic
Liquid Voice.effect: The triggering move loses the Sonic keyword, but gains the Friendly keyword and becomes Water Typed. If the Move was a Status Class Move, you may treat it as a Special Move with DB1.

Long Reach.name: Long Reach
Long Reach.effect: The user may use damaging attacks as if they had a range of "8, 1 Target" instead of their usual range.

Merciless.name: Merciless
Merciless.effect: If the user hits a poisoned target with a damaging attack, it automatically becomes a Critical Hit.

Neuroforce.name: Neuroforce
Neuroforce.effect: Whenever you deal Super-Effective Damage to a target, that target treats your Damage Roll as it were increased by +10.

Power Construct.name: Power Construct
Power Construct.effect: The user changes to Complete Forme until the end of the Scene, and gains Temporary Hit Points equal to half of the maximum hit points that Complete Forme would have. The user cannot gain Temporary Hit Points from other sources while in Complete Forme. Special: The user still uses the HP total and HP Maximum of the Forme that it was in (10% or 50% Forme) before entering Complete Forme. Both Formes must still follow BSR.

Power of Alchemy.name: Power of Alchemy
Power of Alchemy.effect: The Pokémon gains an Ability known by the Target for the remainder of the encounter, or until it is Fainted.

Prism Armor.name: Prism Armor
Prism Armor.effect: The user gains +5 Damage Reduction against Super Effective-Damage. Defensive.

RKS System.name: RKS System
RKS System.effect: The Field becomes Weird, as if affected by the Move Psychic Terrain, for one full round.

Queenly Majesty.name: Queenly Majesty
Queenly Majesty.trigger: An adjacent foe uses a Priority Move or an
Queenly Majesty.effect: Connection – Stomp. The user may attack the triggering foe with Stomp as a Free Action Interrupt.

Radiant Beam.name: Radiant Beam
Radiant Beam.effect: The user may use damaging Grass-Type attacks as if they had a range of "Line 4" instead of their usual range.

Receiver.name: Receiver
Receiver.effect: Each effect below may be used once per scene when triggered: •

Schooling.name: Schooling
Schooling.effect: The user changes to Schooling Forme, and gains Temporary Hit Points equal to half of its own maximum Hit Points. The user cannot gain Temporary Hit Points from other sources while in Schooling Forme. When the user is below half Maximum HP and has no Temporary Hit Points left, they change back into Solo Forme.

Shadow Shield.name: Shadow Shield
Shadow Shield.effect: While at full Hit Points, the user resists all damage one step further. Defensive.

Shields Down.name: Shields Down
Shields Down.effect: The user has two sets of base stats; Meteor and Core. The HP of both forms must be the same. When the user is in Meteor Forme and are reduced to half Maximum HP or lower, they change to Core Forme. The user returns to Meteor Forme while outside of combat if above half Maximum HP.

Revelation.name: Revelation
Revelation.trigger: Someone within 10 meters uses a Damaging
Revelation.effect: The user may immediately use the triggering Move as a Standard Action interrupt.

Slush Rush.name: Slush Rush
Slush Rush.effect: While in Hailing Weather or under half maximum Hit Points, the user’s Initiative is doubled.

Soul Heart.name: Soul Heart
Soul Heart.trigger: A combatant in the encounter Faints
Soul Heart.effect: The user receives +2 Special Attack Combat Stages and gains a tick of Temporary Hit Points.

Water Compaction.name: Water Compaction
Water Compaction.trigger: The user is hit by a Water Type Move
Water Compaction.effect: The user gains a +2d6+4 bonus on damage rolls against foes that were released from a Pokéball or entered the encounter since the user's last turn.

Wily.name: Wily
Wily.trigger: The user is hit by a Damaging Attack
Wily.effect: The user receives +1 Defense Combat Stage. Defensive.

Steelworker.name: Steelworker
Steelworker.trigger: The user takes damage while adjacent to its
Steelworker.effect: The user calculates damage as if it was only Steel-Typed.

Surge Surfer.name: Surge Surfer
Surge Surfer.effect: On Electric Terrain or while under half maximum Hit Points, the user’s Initiative is doubled.

Tangling Hair.name: Tangling Hair
Tangling Hair.trigger: The user is hit by a Melee Attack
Tangling Hair.effect: The attacker receives -1 Speed Combat Stage and is Slowed until the end of its next turn.

Triage.name: Triage
Triage.effect: The user’s moves with the Healing keyword may be used as Priority moves.

Water Bubble.name: Water Bubble
Water Bubble.effect: The user resists Fire-Type attacks one step further, is immune to being Burned, and may always act as though in Rainy Weather. Defensive.

Accelerate.name: Accelerate
Accelerate.effect: The user may use a damaging Move to which they add STAB as a Priority Move. If the Move hits, the user adds half their Speed Stat to the Damage Roll. If the Move already had Priority, the attack gains a +4 Bonus to Accuracy. Replaces: Maelstrom Pulse, Leaf Rush, & Gale Wings

Frisk.name: Frisk
Frisk.effect: The user gains a +2 Bonus to all Accuracy Rolls against adjacent targets.

Gale Wings.name: Gale Wings
Gale Wings.effect: Connection – Quick Attack. The user may use Quick Attack as a Flying-Type Move.

Unaware.name: Unaware
Unaware.effect: Whenever the user attacks, they ignore all positive Combat Stages to the target’s Defense, Special Defense, and Speed.

Abominable.name: Abominable
Abominable.effect: The user’s Base HP is increased by +5. Additionally, the user ignores the Recoil Keyword when attacking.

Adaptability.name: Adaptability
Adaptability.effect: The user gains a +1d10 Bonus to Damage Rolls with Moves with which they apply STAB.

Aftermath.name: Aftermath
Aftermath.effect: The user creates a Burst 1. Everything in the Burst loses three Ticks of Hit Points.

Ambush.name: Ambush
Ambush.effect: The user may activate this Ability to use a Move with a Damage Base of 6 (before applying STAB or other modifiers) or lower as if it had the Priority keyword. If it hits, the target is Flinched and has a -2 penalty to Accuracy Rolls for 1 full round.

Arena Trap.name: Arena Trap
Arena Trap.effect: Once Arena Trap is activated, all foes within 5 meters of the user are considered Slowed and Trapped. This does not affect targets of the Flying Type, or with a Levitate, Sky, or Burrow Speed of 4 or higher. The user may end the effect as a Free Action, and the effect ends if the user is Fainted or returned to a Poké Ball.

Aroma Veil.name: Aroma Veil
Aroma Veil.effect: The user and all adjacent Pokémon and Trainers cannot become Confused, Enraged, or Suppressed. Defensive.

Aura Break.name: Aura Break
Aura Break.effect: The foe reveals its abilities. Pick one ability; any Damage Bonuses (either Damage Base increases or Damage Roll bonuses) granted by the ability instead become Damage Penalties of the same value.

Aura Storm.name: Aura Storm
Aura Storm.effect: For each injury the user has, they gain a +3 Bonus to Damage Rolls.

Bad Dreams.name: Bad Dreams
Bad Dreams.effect: All Sleeping targets within 5 meters lose a Tick of Hit Points. If at least one target lost Hit Points this way, the user gains a tick of Temporary Hit Points.

Beautiful.name: Beautiful
Beautiful.effect: The user may activate Beautiful to either gain +2 Beauty Dice in a Contest, or to gain +1 Special Attack Combat Stage and cure all allies within 5 meters of the Enraged Condition.

Blow Away.name: Blow Away
Blow Away.effect: Connection - Whirlwind. When the user uses Whirlwind, all targets hit are pushed an additional 2 meters and lose a Tick of Hit Points.

Bodyguard.name: Bodyguard
Bodyguard.trigger: An adjacent Ally is hit by an attack
Bodyguard.effect: The user and the triggering Ally switch places, and the user becomes the target of the triggering attack instead, taking damage from the attack as if resisted one step further. If switching places would not move the triggering Ally out of the area-of-effect of a Burst, Blast, Cone, or Line, this Ability does not prevent the ally from being hit. Defensive.

Bone Lord.name: Bone Lord
Bone Lord.trigger: You hit with Bone Club, Bonemerang, or Bone
Bone Lord.effect: Connection – Bonemerang. Once per Scene per Move, the following Moves may be used as if they had the following bonuses: - Bone Club: Bone Club’s target loses 1 Defense and Special Attack CS. - Bonemerang: Has a Range of Line 6 but loses the Double Strike keyword - Bone Rush: Bone Rush automatically ‘hits’ four times (as per the Five Strike keyword).

Bone Wielder.name: Bone Wielder
Bone Wielder.effect: The user’s Bone Club, Bonemerang, and Bone Rush Moves ignore immunity against Ground-Type Moves.

Brimstone.name: Brimstone
Brimstone.effect: Whenever the user inflicts Burn or Poison with a damaging Fire-Type or Poison-Type Attack, the target becomes both Burned and Poisoned.

Celebrate.name: Celebrate
Celebrate.trigger: The user hits a foe with a damaging attack
Celebrate.effect: The user may immediately Disengage as a Free Action.

Chlorophyll.name: Chlorophyll
Chlorophyll.effect: While in Sunny Weather or under 50% Max Hit Points, the user’s Initiative is doubled.

Clay Cannons.name: Clay Cannons
Clay Cannons.effect: Until the end of the round, the user may originate any Ranged Move they use from any square within 2 meters of itself.

Damp.name: Damp
Damp.effect: Whenever anyone within 10 meters would use the Moves Self-Destruct or Explosion or activate the Aftermath Ability, those effects fail and instead do nothing.

Danger Syrup.name: Danger Syrup
Danger Syrup.trigger: The user is hit by an attack
Danger Syrup.effect: Connection - Sweet Scent. When this Ability is activated the user may use Sweet Scent as a Free Action, ignoring Frequency. Whenever the user hits a foe with Sweet Scent, that foe is Blinded for 1 full round.

Defeatist.name: Defeatist
Defeatist.effect: The user gain a +2d6 Bonus to Damage Rolls while over 50% of its Maximum Hit Points. While at 50% Max Hit Points or lower, the user gains a -5 penalty to Damage Rolls and +10 Initiative.

Defy Death.name: Defy Death
Defy Death.effect: The user instantly removes up to three injuries, and gains a Tick of Hit Points for each injury removed this way. Defy Death may be used to cure up to three Injuries per day. Injuries removed this way do not count towards the total number of injuries that can be healed per day.

Desert Weather.name: Desert Weather
Desert Weather.effect: The user is immune to Sandstorm Damage, resists Fire-Type Moves in Sunny Weather, and gains a Tick of Temporary Hit Points at the end of each of its turns while in Rainy Weather.

Download.name: Download
Download.effect: The target must reveal whether its Defense or Special Defense Stats are lower. If the Defense Stat is lower, the user gains a +1 Attack CS.  If the Special Defense Stat is lower, the user instead gains +1 Special Attack CS. If both are tied, the user gains +1 CS to any Stat of their choice.

Dreamspinner.name: Dreamspinner
Dreamspinner.effect: All Sleeping Foes within 3 meters lose a Tick of Hit Points, and the user gains a Tick of Temporary Hit Points.

Drizzle.name: Drizzle
Drizzle.effect: The Weather changes to be Rainy for 1 full round.

Drought.name: Drought
Drought.effect: The Weather changes to be Sunny for 1 full round.

Drown Out.name: Drown Out
Drown Out.trigger: A foe uses a Move with the Sonic keyword
Drown Out.effect: The triggering Move fails and has no effect.

Dust Cloud.name: Dust Cloud
Dust Cloud.effect: Connection - Poison Powder. The user may use Moves with the Powder Keyword as if they had a Range of “Burst 1”.

Early Bird.name: Early Bird
Early Bird.effect: The user gains a bonus to Initiative equal to half its Speed, and a +3 Bonus on Save Checks against Sleep.

Electrodash.name: Electrodash
Electrodash.effect: The user may make a Sprint Action as a Free Action.

Filter.name: Filter
Filter.effect: The user gains +5 Damage Reduction against Super- Effective damage. Defensive.

Flash Fire.name: Flash Fire
Flash Fire.effect: The user is immune to the damage and effects of Fire-Type attacks. If the user is hit by a Fire-Type attack, they gain +1 CS in their choice of Attack or Special Attack. Defensive.

Flare Boost.name: Flare Boost
Flare Boost.effect: The user gains +3Attack and Special Attack Combat Stages. Flare Boost may only be used while Burned.

Flower Gift.name: Flower Gift
Flower Gift.effect: Flower Gift may only be used if the Weather is Sunny or if the user is under 50% Hit Points. When activated, the user may pick two Stats, gaining +2 Combat Stages in each Stat. All targets within 2 meters also gain +1 Combat Stage in each of the chosen Stats.

Flower Veil.name: Flower Veil
Flower Veil.effect: Grass-Type Pokemon within 5 meters cannot have their Combat Stages lowered.

Fox Fire.name: Fox Fire
Fox Fire.effect: Connection - Ember. The user creates 3 Fire Wisps. Whenever the user is targeted by a foe within 6 meters, they may spend a Fire Wisp as to use the Move Ember against that foe as a Free Action after the triggering Move is resolved.

Gluttony.name: Gluttony
Gluttony.effect: The user may have up to three Food Buffs at once, use up to three Food Buffs per Scene, and may eat two refreshments per half hour.

Gore.name: Gore
Gore.effect: Connection - Horn Attack. Horn Attack gains the Double Strike keyword, and pushes its target 2 meters.

Grass Pelt.name: Grass Pelt
Grass Pelt.effect: The user gains two ticks worth of Temporary Hit Points.

Heatproof.name: Heatproof
Heatproof.effect: The user resists Fire Type movesf one step further, and does not lose Hit Points from the Burn Condition.

Heavy Metal.name: Heavy Metal
Heavy Metal.effect: The user’s Weight Class is increased by +2. Their Defense Base Stat is increased by +2, but their Speed Base Stat is decreased by 2.

Honey Paws.name: Honey Paws
Honey Paws.effect: The user may consume Honey to gain a Food Buff as if they had consumed Leftovers. This Food Buff does not count against their normal limit.

Huge Power / Pure Power.name: Huge Power / Pure Power
Huge Power / Pure Power.effect: The user’s Base Attack Stat is increased by +5, and by +1 more for every 10 Levels the user has. This Ability cannot be disabled in any way.

Hustle.name: Hustle
Hustle.effect: The user receives a -2 penalty to all Accuracy Rolls and gains a +10 Bonus to All Damage Rolls.

Hydration.name: Hydration
Hydration.effect: The user is cured of one Status Affliction. Hydration’s Frequency is ignored if used during Rainy Weather.

Ice Body.name: Ice Body
Ice Body.effect: The user gains a Tick of Hit Points. Ice Body may only be used while the user is under 50% Hit Points or in Hailing Weather.

Imposter.name: Imposter
Imposter.effect: If the user is not Transformed, they may use Transform as a Free-Action Interrupt.

Inner Focus.name: Inner Focus
Inner Focus.effect: The user cannot be Flinched, and their Initiative cannot be unwillingly lowered by any effects.

Interference.name: Interference
Interference.effect: The accuracy of all foes within 3 meters is reduced by -2 for 1 full round.

Intimidate.name: Intimidate
Intimidate.effect: Lower the target’s Attack 1 Combat Stage. You may target a specific foe only once per Scene with Intimidate.

Justified.name: Justified
Justified.trigger: The user is hit by a damaging Dark Type Move or
Justified.effect: The user may raise its Attack by +1 Combat Stage.

Kampfgeist.name: Kampfgeist
Kampfgeist.trigger: The user takes Bug, Dark, or Rock-Type Damage
Kampfgeist.effect: The triggering damage is resisted one step further.

Leaf Guard.name: Leaf Guard
Leaf Guard.effect: The user is cured of one Status Affliction. Leaf Guard’s Frequency is ignored if used during Sunny Weather.

Life Force.name: Life Force
Life Force.effect: The user gains a Tick of Hit Points.

Light Metal.name: Light Metal
Light Metal.effect: The user’s Weight Class is decreased by 2. Their Speed Base Stat is increased by +2, but their Defense Base Stat is decreased by 2.

Lightning Kicks.name: Lightning Kicks
Lightning Kicks.effect: The user may activate this Ability to use any Move with “Kick” in the name as a Priority Move, and gain a +4 Bonus to the attack’s Accuracy Roll.

Lightning Rod.name: Lightning Rod
Lightning Rod.trigger: A ranged Electric Type Move is used within 10
Lightning Rod.effect: The Move is turned into a 1-Target Move and is re-directed at the user without fail, and cannot miss. This negates Lock-On or Mind Reader.  The user’s Special Attack is then raised by +1 Combat Stage.

Liquid Ooze.name: Liquid Ooze
Liquid Ooze.effect: This user resists Poison-Type Damage one step further. Additionally, when this user is damaged by Absorb, Drain Punch, Giga Drain, Horn Leech, Leech Life, or Mega Drain, that Move gains Recoil ½ and the Move’s user does not gain any HP. If the user is hit by Leech Seed, the user does not lose Hit Points from Leech Seed; instead Leech Seed’s user loses Hit Points equal to this user’s Tick Value.

Lunchbox.name: Lunchbox
Lunchbox.trigger: The user trades in a Food Buff
Lunchbox.effect: The user gains a Tick of Temporary Hit Points. These Temporary Hit Points stack with any Temporary Hit Points granted by the triggering Food Buff.

Magma Armor.name: Magma Armor
Magma Armor.effect: Whenever a foe hits you with a Melee Attack or ends their turn grappling you, they lose a tick of Hit Points. Foes immune to Burn do not suffer this effect.

Magnet Pull.name: Magnet Pull
Magnet Pull.effect: Pick Two Effects; - The target is pushed or pulled X meters directly away or towards the user. X is up to 6 meters minus the target’s Weight Class. - Until the end of the user’s next turn, the target may not move more then 6 meters away from the user . - Until the end of the user’s next turn, the target may not move closer than 3 meters ot the user.

Mega Launcher.name: Mega Launcher
Mega Launcher.effect: The user increases the Damage Base of Aura Sphere, Dark Pulse, Dragon Pulse, and Water Pulse by +3.

Memory Wipe.name: Memory Wipe
Memory Wipe.effect: If used as a Swift Action, the last Move used by the target becomes Disabled. If used as a Standard Action, the target is Flinched and Paralyzed. If used as an Extended Action that takes about 1 minute, it can erase up to 10 minutes that have occurred within the last 30 minutes from the target’s memory.

Migraine.name: Migraine
Migraine.trigger: The user hits with Confusion while at 50% Hit
Migraine.effect: Connection - Confusion. Confusion automatically gives its target the Confusion Affliction and is a Critical Hit.

Moody.name: Moody
Moody.effect: At the end of the user’s turn, roll 1d6 to determine a Stat to be raised by +2 Combat Stages, then roll 1d6 to determine a Stat to be lowered by 1 Combat Stage. 1 is Attack, 2 is Defense, 3 is Special Attack, 4 is Special Defense, 5 is Speed, and 6 is Accuracy.

Multiscale.name: Multiscale
Multiscale.effect: While at full Hit Points, all damage taken is resisted one step further. Defensive.

Mummy.name: Mummy
Mummy.trigger: The user is hit by a Melee Attack
Mummy.effect: Disable one of the user’s Abilities for the rest of the Scene or until they are switched out.

No Guard.name: No Guard
No Guard.effect: The user gains a +3 bonus to all Attack Rolls; however all foes gain a +3 Bonus on Attack Rolls against the user.

Normalize.name: Normalize
Normalize.effect: The user’s attacks cannot deal Super-Effective or Resisted Damage; they instead resolve as if dealing Neutral Damage. The user also takes neutral damage from all attacks to which they are not immune. This does not affect Immunities.

Odious Spray.name: Odious Spray
Odious Spray.effect: Connection - Poison Gas. The user may use Poison Gas as if it had a Range “8, 1 Target”, an AC of 2, and Flinched its target when it hit.

Perception.name: Perception
Perception.effect: The user gains +1 Evasion. Whenever an Ally uses a damaging area-of-effect attack that would hit you, you may Disengage as a Free Action before the attack resolves.

Permafrost.name: Permafrost
Permafrost.effect: The user is immune to damage and Hit Point loss from Hazards, Weather, Status Afflictions, Vortexes, Recoil, Hay Fever, Iron Barbs, Rough Skin, and Leech Seed. Defensive.

Poltergeist.name: Poltergeist
Poltergeist.effect: Rotom gains an Ability depending on what Form it has taken. If Rotom is level 40 or higher, it also may use a Move based on its Forme as if it that Move was on their Move List. Ability Move Standard Rotom:   Levitate None Heat Rotom:           Flash Fire Overheat Wash Rotom:	      Water Absorb Hydro Pump Frost Rotom: Winter’s Kiss Blizzard Fan Rotom: Windveiled Hurricane Mow Rotom:          Sap Sipper Leaf Storm

Pressure.name: Pressure
Pressure.effect: All foes within 3 meters are Suppressed for 1 full round.

Prime Fury.name: Prime Fury
Prime Fury.effect: The user becomes Enraged, and gains +1 Combat Stage in each of Attack and Special Attack.

Pumpkingrab.name: Pumpkingrab
Pumpkingrab.effect: The user automatically Grapples an adjacent foe and gains dominance.

Quick Curl.name: Quick Curl
Quick Curl.effect: Connection - Defense Curl. The user may activate this Ability to use Defense Curl as an Standard Action Interrupt and gain +10 Damage Reduction for 1 full round.

Quick Feet.name: Quick Feet
Quick Feet.effect: When Poisoned, Burned, Paralyzed, Frozen or put to Sleep, the user’s Speed is raised 2 Combat Stages. The user’s Initiative is not halved by Paralysis. If the user is healed all Status Conditions, their Speed is lowered appropriately.

Rain Dish.name: Rain Dish
Rain Dish.effect: The user gains a Tick of Hit Points. Rain Dish may only be used while the user is under 50% Hit Points or in Rainy Weather.

Rally.name: Rally
Rally.effect: The user and all allies within 10 meters may immediately Disengage 1 Meter as a free Action. Rally does not work on sleeping, paralyzed, stuck, fainted, or otherwise incapacitated allies.

Rattled.name: Rattled
Rattled.trigger: The user is hit by a Bug, Dark, or Ghost Type Move
Rattled.effect: The user’s Speed is raised by +1 Combat Stage, and may immediately Disengage as a Free Action.

Reckless.name: Reckless
Reckless.effect: Increases the Damage Base of Moves with the Exhaust, Recoil, or Reckless Keywords by +3. Reckless Moves: Jump Kick, Hi Jump Kick, Close Combat, Draco Meteor, Hammer Arm, Leaf Storm, Outrage, Overheat, Petal Dance, Psycho Boost, Superpower, Thrash, and V-Create.

Regal Challenge.name: Regal Challenge
Regal Challenge.effect: Ask the target if they will show deference or defiance. If they choose Deference, the target loses their next Shift action and loses 3 CS in the Stat of the user’s choice.  If they choose Defiance, the user gains a +10 Bonus to all Damage Rolls for the rest of the Scene.

Rock Head.name: Rock Head
Rock Head.effect: The user ignores the Recoil keyword when attacking. If the user moves at least 4 meters in a straight line towards a foe before attacking that foe with a physical attack, they may add a +2d6 Bonus to the Damage Roll against that foe.

Rocket.name: Rocket
Rocket.effect: The user may take their turn at the top of the round. Priority, Interrupt, or Reaction Moves or Abilities cannot be declared in response to the user’s turn.

Root Down.name: Root Down
Root Down.effect: Connection - Ingrain. While the user has the Ingrain Coat, they may activate this Ability to gain 5 Damage Reduction.

Run Away.name: Run Away
Run Away.effect: The user does not provoke Attacks of Opportunity by Shifting.  The user cannot be Trapped.

Sap Sipper.name: Sap Sipper
Sap Sipper.effect: The user is immune to the damage and effects of Grass-Type attacks. If the user is hit by a Grass-Type attack, they gain +1 CS in their choice of Attack or Special Attack. Defensive.

Sand Force.name: Sand Force
Sand Force.effect: While on sandy terrain or in Sandstorms, the user’s Ground, Rock, and Steel-Typed damaging moves deal +5 Damage.

Sand Rush.name: Sand Rush
Sand Rush.effect: While in Sandstorming Weather or under 50% Max Hit Points, the user’s Initiative is doubled.

Sand Stream.name: Sand Stream
Sand Stream.effect: The Weather changes to a Sandstorm for 1 full round.

Sand Veil.name: Sand Veil
Sand Veil.effect: The user gains +1 Evasion. This is increased to +2 Evasion while in a Sandstorm or sandy terrain. While in a Sandstorm, the user and adjacent allies do not lose Hit Points due to the Sandstorm.

Sequence.name: Sequence
Sequence.trigger: The user uses an Electric Attack
Sequence.effect: For every Electric-Type Pokémon adjacent to the user, the triggering Attack deals an additional +3 Damage.

Shackle.name: Shackle
Shackle.effect: Shackle creates a Burst 3. All foes in the burst have their movement capabilities halved until the end of their next turn.

Sheer Force.name: Sheer Force
Sheer Force.effect: Moves with an Effect Range gain a +10 Bonus to Damage, but Effect Ranges can never be triggered.

Serpent’s Mark.name: Serpent’s Mark
Serpent’s Mark.effect: Arbok’s Advanced and High Abilities depend on the Arbok’s hood pattern. To determine its pattern, roll 1d6 upon evolution or upon generation. If an Arbok is bred, it will have the same pattern as its parent. If both parents are Arboks with different patterns, flip a coin to decide which pattern is inherited. Pattern Name - Adv Ability / High Ability 1) Attack Pattern - Strong Jaw / Guts 2) Crush Pattern - Crush Trap / Frisk 3) Fear Pattern - Unnerve / Regal Challenge 4) Life Pattern – Regenerator / Defy Death 5) Speed Pattern - Run Away / Speed Boost 6) Stealth Pattern - Infiltrator / Ambush

Shell Shield.name: Shell Shield
Shell Shield.effect: Connection - Withdraw. The user may activate this Ability to use Withdraw as an Standard Action Interrupt and gain +10 Damage Reduction for 1 full round.

Silk Threads.name: Silk Threads
Silk Threads.effect: Connection - String Shot. Whenever the user uses String Shot, all targets hit become Slowed and Vulnerable for 1 full round.

Sniper.name: Sniper
Sniper.effect: When the user gets a Critical Hit, the attack deals +3d10 additional damage.

Snow Cloak.name: Snow Cloak
Snow Cloak.effect: The user gains +1 Evasion. This is increased to +2 Evasion while in Hail or snowy terrain. While in Hail, the user and adjacent allies do not lose Hit Points due to the Hail.

Solar Power.name: Solar Power
Solar Power.effect: The user loses a Tick of Hit Points, and gains a bonus to the triggering damage roll equal to 5 + their Tick Value. Solar Power may be activated ignoring Frequency while in Sunny Weather.

Solid Rock.name: Solid Rock
Solid Rock.effect: The user gains +5 Damage Reduction against Super- Effective damage. Defensive.

Sonic Courtship.name: Sonic Courtship
Sonic Courtship.effect: Connection - Attract. The user may use Attract as if it had a range of “Burst 3, Sonic, Friendly”.

Soothing Tone.name: Soothing Tone
Soothing Tone.effect: Connection - Heal Bell. Whenever the user uses a Move that targets allies, those allies gain temporary Hit Points equal to the user’s Special Attack. This may affect a specific ally only once per Scene.

Soulstealer.name: Soulstealer
Soulstealer.trigger: The user’s attack causes a foe to Faint
Soulstealer.effect: The user removes one Injury from themselves and gains Hit Points equal to 25% of their Max Hit Points. If the triggering attack killed its target, the user instead removes all Injuries and recovers Hit Points equal to 50% of the user’s Max Hit Points.

Sound Lance.name: Sound Lance
Sound Lance.effect: Connection – Supersonic. The target of Supersonic loses Hit Points equal to the user’s Special Attack. This occurs even if Supersonic misses.

Spray Down.name: Spray Down
Spray Down.trigger: The user hits an airborne target with a ranged
Spray Down.effect: The triggering attack’s target is knocked down to ground level, and loses all Sky or Levitate Speeds for 3 turns. During this time, they may be hit by Ground-Type Moves even if normally immune.

Sprint.name: Sprint
Sprint.trigger: The user uses the Sprint Action during Combat
Sprint.effect: The user gains +2 Speed Combat Stages.

Starlight.name: Starlight
Starlight.effect: The user may activate Starlight while exposed to moonlight or starlight to become Luminous. As a Swift Action, the user may expend the Luminous condition to gain +2 Special Defense CS and +2 Evasion for the rest of the Scene.

Starswirl.name: Starswirl
Starswirl.effect: Connection – Rapid Spin. The user may activate this Ability to user Rapid Spin as a Swift Action.

Steadfast.name: Steadfast
Steadfast.effect: The user’s Speed is raised by +1 Combat Stage.

Stench.name: Stench
Stench.effect: The Pokémon’s Moves Flinch Targets on a roll of 18+. If a move already has a chance of Flinching foes, the Effect Range is increased by +3 instead. Whenever the user Flinches a foe with an attack, that foe gains a -2 penalty to Accuracy Rolls for 1 full round.

Storm Drain.name: Storm Drain
Storm Drain.trigger: A ranged Water Type Move is used within 10
Storm Drain.effect: The Move is turned into a 1-Target Move and is re-directed at the user without fail, and cannot miss. This negates Lock-On or Mind Reader.  the user’s Special Attack is then raised by +1 Combat Stage.

Sturdy.name: Sturdy
Sturdy.effect: The user is immune to Moves with the Execute Keyword. If a single source of Damage or Hit Point Loss would cause the user to lose more than X Hit Points, the damage or Hit Point loss is instead reduced to X. X is equal to 50% of their Max Hit Points. Defensive.

Suction Cups.name: Suction Cups
Suction Cups.effect: The user gains +5 Damage Reduction for 1 full round.

Sumo Stance.name: Sumo Stance
Sumo Stance.trigger: The user hits a foe with a Melee Attack
Sumo Stance.effect: The triggering foe is Pushed 1 meter away from the user and the user is immune to Push Effects for 1 full round.

Sunglow.name: Sunglow
Sunglow.effect: The user may activate Sunglow while exposed to sunlight to become Radiant. As a Swift Action, the user may expend the Radiant condition to gain +2 Attack CS and +2 Accuracy for the rest of the Scene.

Sun Blanket.name: Sun Blanket
Sun Blanket.effect: The user gains a Tick of Hit Points. Sun Blanket may only be triggered while the user is under 50% Hit Points or in Sunny Weather.

Swift Swim.name: Swift Swim
Swift Swim.effect: While in Rainy Weather or under 50% Max Hit Points, the user’s Initiative is doubled.

Symbiosis.name: Symbiosis
Symbiosis.effect: The user choses a Held Item they are holding. If the target is willing, they also gain the effects of the chosen item for the rest of the Scene. Items that are activated at a frequency may be activated independently by the user and the the target.

Tangled Feet.name: Tangled Feet
Tangled Feet.effect: While Confused or Slowed, the user gains +3 Evasion. The user is immune to the Vulnerable Condition.

Telepathy.name: Telepathy
Telepathy.effect: The user gains +1 Evasion. Whenever an Ally uses a damaging area-of-effect attack that would hit you, you may Disengage as a Free Action before the attack resolves.

Teravolt.name: Teravolt
Teravolt.effect: The user’s Electric-Type Attacks ignore the effect of enemies’ Defensive Abilities, and if they would be resisted they deal neutral damage instead.

Toxic Boost.name: Toxic Boost
Toxic Boost.effect: The user gains +3 Attack and Special Attack Combat Stages. Toxic Boost may only be used while Poisoned or Badly Poisoned. Special: If the user has the Immunity Ability, they can still become Poisoned and Badly Poisoned but do not lose Hit Points from these conditions.

Turboblaze.name: Turboblaze
Turboblaze.effect: The user’s Fire-Type Attacks ignore the effect of enemies’ Defensive Abilities, and if they would be resisted they deal neutral damage instead.

Unburden.name: Unburden
Unburden.effect: The default state of the user’s Speed is +2 Combat Stages. While holding a Held Item, the user’s Speed is lowered by 2 Combat Stages.

Unnerve.name: Unnerve
Unnerve.effect: The target cannot gain positive Combat Stages or trade in Digestion Buffs for 1 full round.

Whirlwind Kicks.name: Whirlwind Kicks
Whirlwind Kicks.effect: Connection – Triple Kick. When the user uses the Moves “Rapid Spin” or “Triple Kick”, they have a range of “Burst 1”.

Windveiled.name: Windveiled
Windveiled.effect: The user is immune to the damage and effects of Flying-Type attacks. If the user is hit by a Flying-Type attack, the user gains +1 Speed CS. Defensive.

Zen Mode.name: Zen Mode
Zen Mode.effect: The user changes into Zen Mode forme for the rest of the Scene, and may use the Moves “Flamethrower” and “Psychic” as if they were on its Move List.

Aqua Bullet.name: Aqua Bullet
Aqua Bullet.effect: Connection - Aqua Jet. The user may use Water- Type Moves as a Full Action to gain Sky 10 and shift in a straight line before attempting to use their Move. When shifting this way, the user does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

Designer.name: Designer
Designer.effect: The user is adept at crafting clothes for itself out of common leaves. When activating this ability to create a leaf suit, the user may choose two Types; the user resists the chosen types one step further while wearing that suit. The user may only have one leaf suit at a time, and creating a new suit destroys the old one.

Combo Striker.name: Combo Striker
Combo Striker.trigger: The user rolls a natural 1, 10, or 11 on an attack roll
Combo Striker.effect: After the triggering attack is resolved, the user may use a Struggle Attack as a Free Action. Note: Yes, Struggle Attacks made due to Combo Striker may trigger Combo Striker.

Dream Smoke.name: Dream Smoke
Dream Smoke.trigger: The user is hit by a Melee Attack

Eggscellence.name: Eggscellence
Eggscellence.effect: Connection – Barrage. The user receives STAB when using Barrage and Egg Bomb. If Normal Typed, these Moves deal Damage as if one step more effective on 16+.

Empower.name: Empower
Empower.effect: The user may use a self-targeting Status-Class Move as a Free Action.

Flower Power.name: Flower Power
Flower Power.effect: The user may perform damaging Grass Type Moves as if they were their choice of either Physical or Special.

Full Guard.name: Full Guard
Full Guard.trigger: You take Damage while having Temporary Hit
Full Guard.effect: You resist the triggering Damage one step further.

Giver.name: Giver
Giver.effect: Connection - Present. After rolling to determine Present’s Damage Base, you may choose to ignore the roll and act as if you had rolled a 1 or a 5.

Heliovolt.name: Heliovolt
Heliovolt.trigger: The user uses an Electric-Type Move
Heliovolt.effect: For 1 full round, the user gains +1 Evasion and is considered to be in Sunny Weather.

Juicy Energy.name: Juicy Energy
Juicy Energy.trigger: The user trades in a Berry Juice Food Buff
Juicy Energy.effect: Instead of gaining 30 Hit Points, the user gains Hit Points equal to their Level

Lancer.name: Lancer
Lancer.effect: During their turn, if the user Shifts at least 3 meters, they gain a +3 Bonus to Critical Hit Range until the beginning of their next turn. If they do not Shift or Disengage at all, they gain +5 Damage Reduction until the beginning of their next turn.

Leaf Rush.name: Leaf Rush
Leaf Rush.effect: The user may activate Leaf Rush to use a Grass-Type Move with Priority. If the Move is a Damaging Move, the user adds half their Speed Stat to the Damage Roll.

Leafy Cloak.name: Leafy Cloak
Leafy Cloak.effect: Whenever the user activates Designer, theychoose two of Chlorophyll, Leaf Guard, or Overcoat. Until the user activates Designer again, they gain the chosen Abilities.

Line Charge.name: Line Charge
Line Charge.effect: The user can only shift in cardinal directions on the grid. However,  they do not provoke attacks of opportunity from Shifting.

Maelstrom Pulse.name: Maelstrom Pulse
Maelstrom Pulse.effect: The user may activate Maelstrom Pulse to use a Water-Type Move with Priority. If the Move is a Damaging Move, the user adds half their Speed Stat to the Damage Roll.

Needles.name: Needles
Needles.effect: Connection – Needle Arm. Whenever the user hits a target with a Physical Melee attack, that target loses a Tick of Hit Points.

Nimble Strikes.name: Nimble Strikes
Nimble Strikes.effect: The user adds half their Speed Stat to the Damage Rolls of their physical Normal-Type Moves.

Ragelope.name: Ragelope
Ragelope.effect: The user’s Physical Attacks gain the following Effect Range: On 18+, the user becomes Enraged and gains +1 Speed CS. If the user is already Enraged, they gain +1 Attack CS instead.

Sacred Bell.name: Sacred Bell
Sacred Bell.effect: The user resists Dark and Ghost-Type Damage one step further.

Seasonal.name: Seasonal
Seasonal.effect: The user gains an Ability based on the season. - Spring: Run Away - Summer: Grass Pelt - Autumn: Rivalry - Winter: Thick Fat

Snuggle.name: Snuggle
Snuggle.effect: The user and the target each gain two ticks of Temporary Hit Points.

Sol Veil.name: Sol Veil
Sol Veil.effect: The user gains +1 Evasion. This is increased to +2 Evasion while in Sunny Weather or on grassy terrain. While in Sunny Weather, the user gains +5 Damage Reduction.

Sorcery.name: Sorcery
Sorcery.effect: The user’s Base Special Attack Stat is increased by +5, and by +1 more for every 10 Levels the user has. This Ability cannot be disabled in any way.

Spike Shot.name: Spike Shot
Spike Shot.effect: The user may use Moves with a Range of “Melee, 1-Target” as if they had a Range of “8, 1-Target” instead.

Tingle.name: Tingle
Tingle.trigger: The user hits an adjacent target foe with a 1-Target
Tingle.effect: The target loses a Tick of Hit Points and takes a -5 penalty to Damage Rolls for 1 full round.

Tonguelash.name: Tonguelash
Tonguelash.trigger: The user hits a target with Lick
Tonguelash.effect: Connection – Lick. Lick automatically Paralyzes and Flinches its target.

Trinity.name: Trinity
Trinity.effect: Connection - Tri Attack. You may use Tri Attack as if it had a range of “Melee, 3 Targets”. Make a different attack roll for each target. If Tri-Attack’s effect range is activated, do not roll for the effect; the first target can only be Frozen, the second can only be Burned, and the third can only be Paralyzed. Additionally, you may use Tri-Attack as a Physical Attack if you wish.

Type Aura.name: Type Aura
Type Aura.effect: The user and all allies within 3 meters gain a +5 Bonus to Damage Rolls with Moves matching the user’s Primary Type.

Weird Power.name: Weird Power
Weird Power.effect: If the user’s Attack is higher than its Special Attack, the user may add its Attack Stat to its Special Damage Rolls. If their Special Attack is higher, they user may add its Special Attack Stat to its Physical Damage Rolls. This does not stack with Mixed Power.

Absorb Force.name: Absorb Force
Absorb Force.trigger: The user is damaged by a Physical Attack
Absorb Force.effect: The user takes damage as if the attack was resisted one step further.

Aerilate.name: Aerilate
Aerilate.trigger: The user uses a Normal-Type damaging Move
Aerilate.effect: The Move is changed to be Flying-Type.

Air Lock.name: Air Lock
Air Lock.effect: The weather is set to normal as long as the Pokémon with Air Lock wants it to remain that way. The user may continue to sustain this effect as a Swift Action each round.

Analytic.name: Analytic
Analytic.effect: Whenever the user targets uses a damaging Move on a Pokémon or Trainer that has acted before it during Initiative this Round, that Move deals an additional +5 Damage.

Anger Point.name: Anger Point
Anger Point.effect: When the Pokémon receives a Critical Hit, they become Enraged and gain +6 Attack Combat Stages.

Anticipation.name: Anticipation
Anticipation.effect: The target reveals if they have any Moves that are Super-Effective against the Pokémon with Anticipation. You may not target a Pokémon or Trainer more than once per encounter with Anticipation. Anticipation only reveals whether the opponent does or does not have those moves, not the specific moves themselves.

Aqua Boost.name: Aqua Boost
Aqua Boost.trigger: An adjacent Ally uses a damaging Water-Type
Aqua Boost.effect: The allied target gains a +5 Bonus to its damage roll with the triggering Move. A target may not benefit from more than one instance of Aqua Boost at a time.

Battle Armor.name: Battle Armor
Battle Armor.effect: The user is immune to Critical Hits; they are instead normal hits. Defensive.

Beam Cannon.name: Beam Cannon
Beam Cannon.effect: The Effect Range and Critical Hit Range of the user’s Ranged, 1-Target Moves are increased by 3.

Berry Storage.name: Berry Storage
Berry Storage.effect: The user gains 3 instances of the Berry’s Digestion Buff instead of 1. It may only trade in one of these Digestion Buffs each Scene. Neither storing nor trading in these Digestion Buffs counts against the user’s normal limits. All Digestion Buffs gained from Berry Storage are lost after an Extended Rest.

Big Pecks.name: Big Pecks
Big Pecks.effect: The user cannot have its Defense Stat lowered. The user cannot have its Defense Combat Stages lowered. Defensive.

Big Swallow.name: Big Swallow
Big Swallow.effect: Connection - Stockpile. Whenever the user uses Swallow or Spit Up, it may treat the Stockpile Count as if it was one higher. This Ability has no effect if the Stockpile Counter is already 3.

Blaze.name: Blaze
Blaze.effect: The user gains Last Chance with Fire.

Blessed Touch.name: Blessed Touch
Blessed Touch.effect: An adjacent Pokémon or Trainer gains Hit Points equal to 1/4th of its maximum Hit Points.

Blur.name: Blur
Blur.effect: Attacks and Moves targeting you that don’t require an Accuracy Check now require one, as though they had an Accuracy Check of 2. You may only apply half of your Evasion to these Attacks and Moves. Defensive.

Bulletproof.name: Bulletproof
Bulletproof.effect: The user resists all X target ranged attacks one step further. This refers to attacks and Moves that simply hit one target or specify hitting multiple targets, such as Razor Wind hitting three targets. It has no effect on Moves that are capable of hitting multiple targets through areas of effect, such as Bursts or Cones. Defensive.

Bully.name: Bully
Bully.trigger: The user hits a target for Super-Effective
Bully.effect: The target of the attack is pushed 2 Meters, becomes Tripped, and gains an Injury.

Cave Crasher.name: Cave Crasher
Cave Crasher.effect: The user resists Ground-Type and Rock-Type attacks one step further. Defensive.

Cherry Power.name: Cherry Power
Cherry Power.effect: The user gains 15 Temporary Hit Points, and is cured of all Persistent Status Afflictions.

Clear Body.name: Clear Body
Clear Body.effect: The user’s Combat Stages may not be lowered by the effect of foes’ Feautres, Abilities, or Moves. Status Affictions may still alter their Combat Stages. Defensive.

Cloud Nine.name: Cloud Nine
Cloud Nine.effect: The weather of the field is set to normal.

Cluster Mind.name: Cluster Mind
Cluster Mind.effect: The user’s Move Pool limit is increased by +2.

Color Change.name: Color Change
Color Change.trigger: The user is hit by a Move
Color Change.effect: The user’s Type changes to match the Type of the triggering Move.

Color Theory.name: Color Theory
Color Theory.effect: Upon gaining this ability at Birth, the user rolls 1d12 to determine the color of their tail secretions. 1 = Red; 2 = Red-Orange; 3 = Orange; 4 = Yellow- Orange; 5 = Yellow; 6 = Yellow-Green; 7 = Green; 8 = Blue-Green; 9 = Blue; 10 = Blue-Violet; 11 = Violet; 12 = Red-Violet. Red is tied to Attack, Orange is tied to Defense, Yellow is tied to Special Attack, Green is tied to Special Defense, Blue is tied to Speed, Violet is tied to HP. Users with a “Pure” Color (Red, Orange, Yellow, etc) gain a +6 Bonus to the Base Stat tied to their color. Users with a “Mixed” Color (Red-Orange, Yellow-Orange, etc) gain a +3 Bonus to each Stat tied to the color.

Competitive.name: Competitive
Competitive.effect: Whenever the user has its Combat Stages lowered, by something other than its own Moves or Abilities, the user’s Special Attack is raised 2 Combat Stages.

Compound Eyes.name: Compound Eyes
Compound Eyes.effect: The user gains a +3 Bonus to all Accuracy Rolls.

Confidence.name: Confidence
Confidence.effect: Choose a Combat Stat. All allies within 5 meters of the user gain +1 CS in the Chosen Stat.

Contrary.name: Contrary
Contrary.effect: If something would raise the user’s Combat Stages, it instead lowers the user’s Combat Stages by the same amount. If something would lower the user’s Combat Stages, it instead raises the user’s Combat Stages by the same amount.

Conqueror.name: Conqueror
Conqueror.trigger: The user causes a foe to Faint by using a
Conqueror.effect: The user’s Attack, Special Attack, and Speed gain +1 Combat Stage.

Copy Master.name: Copy Master
Copy Master.effect: Connection - Copycat. Whenever the user uses Copycat or Mimic, it gains +1 Combat Stage in a Stat of its choice after the Move is resolved.

Corrosive Toxins.name: Corrosive Toxins
Corrosive Toxins.effect: Connection - Toxic. The user may activate this Ability when using Toxic to allow the Move to ignore Immunity to the Status Affliction, Blessings, and the effects of Abilities that may prevent Hit Point loss from being Badly Poisoned (such as Magic Guard or Poison Heal).

Courage.name: Courage
Courage.effect: While at or under 1/3rd of its Max Hit Point value, the user gains a +5 Damage Bonus to all Damage Rolls, and 5 Damage Reduction. Defensive.

Covert.name: Covert
Covert.effect: If this Pokémon is standing on a terrain related to its natural habitat, its Evasion is increased by +2. For Ice types, this is generally snowy or icy terrain; Ground and Ground types are apt to feel at home in sandy terrain or craggy rocks; Grass types, Bug Types, and others likely feel at home in long grass.  Some Pokémon may be at home in several types of terrain.

Cruelty.name: Cruelty
Cruelty.trigger: The user hits a foe with a damaging attack
Cruelty.effect: After Damage is Resolved, the foe gains an Injury. The user is then informed of the total number of Injuries currently on the target, and may use that number to “purchase” the effects listed below. »» 1 Injury: The target loses 2 Hit Points. May be “pur- chased” multiple times. »» 1 Injury: The target is Slowed. »» 2 Injuries: Until the end of the encounter, the target may not gain Hit Points or Temporary Hit Points from any source. This effect ends if the target is switched out or Takes a Breather.

Crush Trap.name: Crush Trap
Crush Trap.trigger: The user successfully Grapples a target
Crush Trap.effect: Connection – Wrap. When you activate this ability, the user may immediately deal damage to the target as if the user had hit with a Struggle Attack. There is no Accuracy Roll and thus this damage cannot miss, be a Critical Hit, or trigger any Effect Ranges.

Cursed Body.name: Cursed Body
Cursed Body.trigger: The user is hit by a Damaging Move.

Cute Charm.name: Cute Charm
Cute Charm.trigger: A foe of the opposite gender attacks the user

Cute Tears.name: Cute Tears
Cute Tears.trigger: The user is hit by a Damaging Attack
Cute Tears.effect: The attacking foe loses 2 Combat Stages in the Attack Stat used by the triggering Move.

Dark Art.name: Dark Art
Dark Art.effect: The user gains Last Chance with Dark.

Dark Aura.name: Dark Aura
Dark Aura.effect: The user and all allies have the Damage Base of their damaging Dark Type Attacks increased by +1.

Daze.name: Daze
Daze.effect: Make an AC4 Status Attack against a target within 6 meters. If you hit, the target falls asleep.

Deadly Poison.name: Deadly Poison
Deadly Poison.effect: The target is Badly Poisoned instead.

Decoy.name: Decoy
Decoy.effect: The user uses the Move “Follow Me” as if it was on their Move List, and their Evasion is raised by +2 until the end of their next turn.

Deep Sleep.name: Deep Sleep
Deep Sleep.effect: When asleep, this Pokémon restores a Tick of Hit Points at the end of each turn.

Defiant.name: Defiant
Defiant.effect: Whenever the user has its Combat Stages lowered, by something other than its own Moves or Abilities, the user’s Attack is raised 2 Combat Stages.

Delayed Reaction.name: Delayed Reaction
Delayed Reaction.trigger: The user is hit by a direct damaging attack
Delayed Reaction.effect: Halve the damage taken by the user. At the end of the user’s next turn, the user loses Hit Points equal to the other half of the damage. For example, if the user is hit for 11 damage and triggers this Ability, the user would take 5 damage upon being hit and 6 damage at the end of its next turn. Defensive.

Delivery Bird.name: Delivery Bird
Delivery Bird.effect: The user may hold two Held Items at once. Whenever an Ability or Move affects the user’s Held Items, you may choose which one is affected.

Diamond Defense.name: Diamond Defense
Diamond Defense.effect: Connection - Stealth Rock. Stealth Rock’s Frequency is Scene x2, and the user’s Stealth Rocks can be treated as dealing Rock-Type or Fairy-Type Damage, whichever is more effective.

Dig Away.name: Dig Away
Dig Away.effect: Connection - Dig. When hit by a Move, this Pokémon may activate this Feature to use Dig, frequency allowing, as an interrupt to avoid the attack and shift underground immediately. This consumes a command as normal. The terrain must allow for Dig to be used.

Discipline.name: Discipline
Discipline.effect: If the user gains initiative and is Confused, Enraged, Infatuated, or Flinched, they may activate Discipline to cure themselves of any of these conditions.

Dire Spore.name: Dire Spore
Dire Spore.effect: Connection - Spore. Whenever the user hits a target with Spore, that target is also Poisoned.

Dodge.name: Dodge
Dodge.trigger: The user is hit by a Damaging Move
Dodge.effect: The triggering Move instead misses. Defensive.

Dry Skin.name: Dry Skin
Dry Skin.effect: Whenever the user is hit by a damaging Fire- Type Move or ends their turn in Sunny Weather, they lose a Tick of Hit Points. The user is immune to the damage and effects of Water-Type Moves, and whenever the user is hit by a damaging Water-Type Move or ends their turn in Rainy Weather, they gain a Tick of Hit Points.

Effect Spore.name: Effect Spore
Effect Spore.trigger: The user is hit by a Melee Attack
Effect Spore.effect: Roll 1d6. On a result of 1 or 2, the attacker is Poisoned. On a result of 3 or 4, the attacker is Paralyzed. On a result of 5 or 6, the attacker falls Asleep.

Enfeebling Lips.name: Enfeebling Lips
Enfeebling Lips.effect: Connection - Lovely Kiss. Whenever the user uses the Move Lovely Kiss, they may choose a Stat. If the Move successfully hits, the Pokémon or Trainer being targeted loses 2 Combat Stages in that Stat.

Enduring Rage.name: Enduring Rage
Enduring Rage.effect: The user may not make rolls to cure themselves from the Enraged condition. However, while Enraged, the user gains 5 Damage Reduction.

Exploit.name: Exploit
Exploit.effect: Whenever you deal Super-Effective Damage to a target, that target treats your Damage Roll as it were increased by +5. Ability List: F–K

Fabulous Trim.name: Fabulous Trim
Fabulous Trim.effect: Furfrou’s Ability depends on its current hairstyle. A Furfrou’s hairstyle can be changed as an Extended Action at an appropriate hair parlor. Star Trim: Celebrate Diamond Trim: Defiant Heart Trim: Cute Tears Pharaoh Trim: Sand Veil Kabuki Trim: Inner Focus La Reine Trim: Intimidate Matron Trim: Friend Guard Dandy Trim: Moxie Debutante Trim: Confidence

Fade Away.name: Fade Away
Fade Away.effect: The user becomes Invisible until the beginning of their next turn, and may immediately Shift. This Ability may be activated as an Interrupt when hit by a Physical attack; the user may declare the use of Fade Away to avoid all damage and/or effects of the move. Defensive.

Fairy Aura.name: Fairy Aura
Fairy Aura.effect: The user and all allies have the Damage Base of their damaging Fairy Type Attacks increased by +1.

Fashion Designer.name: Fashion Designer
Fashion Designer.effect: The user knows how to make useful accessories from mere common leaves. The user may craft one of the consumable Held Items below by activating this ability. Lucky Leaf - Grass Type Booster for one encounter. Tasty Reeds - Bug Type Booster for one encounter. Dew Cup - Same Effect as an Occa Berry. Thorn Mantle - Same Effect as a Coba Berry. Chewy Cluster - Same Effect as Leftovers. Decorative Twine – Roll +2d6 on any Move during a Contest.

Fiery Crash.name: Fiery Crash
Fiery Crash.effect: Whenever the user uses a Move with the Dash keyword, they may either increase that Move’s Damage Base by +2, or change the Move to be Fire-Type if it was not already. All Moves with the Dash keyword performed as Fire-Typed burn their target on 19+, or increase the effect range by +2 if they could already inflict Burn.

Flame Body.name: Flame Body
Flame Body.trigger: The user is hit by a Melee Attack

Flame Tongue.name: Flame Tongue
Flame Tongue.trigger: The user hits a foe with Lick.
Flame Tongue.effect: Connection – Lick. The foe hit with Lick gains an Injury and becomes Burned.

Fluffy Charge.name: Fluffy Charge
Fluffy Charge.effect: Connection – Charge. Whenever the user uses Charge, they gain +1 CS to Defense.

Flutter.name: Flutter
Flutter.effect: The user gains +3 Evasion until the end of their next turn, and cannot be Flanked.

Flying Fly Trap.name: Flying Fly Trap
Flying Fly Trap.effect: The Pokémon takes no damage from Ground Type Moves and Bug Type Moves. Defensive.

Focus.name: Focus
Focus.effect: The user gains Last Chance with Fighting.

Forecast.name: Forecast
Forecast.effect: The user’s Type changes depending on the weather. It changes to Fire Type if it is Sunny, Ice Type if it is Hailing, Water Type if it is Rainy, and Rock Type if there is a Sandstorm. It returns to Normal Type if it is in normal weather or foggy weather. If there are multiple Weather Effects on the field, choose one type for the user to be that corresponds with an existing Weather Effect.

Forest Lord.name: Forest Lord
Forest Lord.effect: This turn, the user may originate a Grass or Ghost-Typed Move from any fully grown tree within 10 meters. Moves performed this way gain a +2 Bonus on their Accuracy Roll.

Forewarn.name: Forewarn
Forewarn.effect: The Move with the highest Damage Dice Roll known by the targeted foe is revealed. If there is a tie, all tied Moves are revealed. The Moves revealed gain a -2 Penalty during Accuracy Checks when used by the target for the rest of the encounter.

Freezing Point.name: Freezing Point
Freezing Point.effect: The user gains Last Chance with Ice.

Friend Guard.name: Friend Guard
Friend Guard.effect: The damage is resisted one step further. Defensive.

Frighten.name: Frighten
Frighten.effect: Lower the target’s Speed 2 Combat Stages.

Frostbite.name: Frostbite
Frostbite.effect: The user’s damaging Ice-Type attacks cause the target to become Slowed on 18+, and the Effect Range for Freeze on these Moves is increased by +1. If the Move does not cause Freezing, it now causes Freezing on a roll of 20.

Fur Coat.name: Fur Coat
Fur Coat.effect: The user resists all Physical Attacks one step further. Defensive.

Gardener.name: Gardener
Gardener.effect: Increase the soil quality of the plant by +1, as if Mulch had been applied. This may target a specific Plant only once per day.

Gentle Vibe.name: Gentle Vibe
Gentle Vibe.effect: All targets in the burst, including the user, have their Combat Stages reset, and are cured of any Volatile Status ailments.

Gooey.name: Gooey
Gooey.trigger: The user is hit by a Melee Attack
Gooey.effect: The triggering attacker has their Speed lowered by 1 Combat Stage.

Gulp.name: Gulp
Gulp.effect: If the user is allowed to spend time fully submerged in water for at least 10 minutes, they may heal up to 25% of their Max Hit Points, and remove one Injury.

Guts.name: Guts
Guts.effect: While suffering from Burn, Poison, Paralysis, Freezing, or while Asleep, the user’s Attack is raised 2 Combat Stages. If suffering from none of these conditions, the user loses any Combat Stages gained this way.

Harvest.name: Harvest
Harvest.effect: Whenever the user trades in a Digestion Buff from a Berry, flip a coin. On heads, the user gains all the benefits of the Digestion Buff, but the Buff is not used up. On tails, the Buff is consumed normally. While in Sunny Weather, the Buff is never consumed. The user may trade in a Digestion Buff up to once per turn during an encounter, but only until they flip “Tails”.

Haunt.name: Haunt
Haunt.effect: The user gains Last Chance with Ghost.

Hay Fever.name: Hay Fever
Hay Fever.trigger: The user uses a Status Move; or the user ends
Hay Fever.effect: The user creates a Burst 2 or Close Blast 3 of allergenic pollen. All Trainers and Pokémon in the burst that are not Bug, Grass, or Poison Typed lose a Tick of Hit Points. This Ability cannot be activated in Rainy Weather, Sandstorms, or if it is Hailing.

Healer.name: Healer
Healer.effect: The target is cured of all Status conditions.

Heat Mirage.name: Heat Mirage
Heat Mirage.trigger: The user uses a Fire-Type Move
Heat Mirage.effect: The user’s Evasion is increased by +3 until the beginning of their next turn.

Helper.name: Helper
Helper.effect: Connection - Helping Hand. Whenever the user uses a Move that targets a single Ally, that Ally gains a +1 Bonus to Accuracy and Skill Checks until the end of the user’s next turn.

Honey Thief.name: Honey Thief
Honey Thief.effect: Connection - Bug Bite. If the user uses Bug Bite to steal the effects of a Digestion Buff, they gain a Tick of Temporary Hit Points.

Huge Power.name: Huge Power
Huge Power.effect: The Pokémon’s Base Attack stat is doubled. This may double any bonuses from Nature or Vitamins, but not bonuses from Trainer Features.

Hyper Cutter.name: Hyper Cutter
Hyper Cutter.effect: The user’s Attack Stat may not be lowered, and its Attack Combat Stages may not be lowered. Defensive.

Hypnotic.name: Hypnotic
Hypnotic.effect: Connection - Hypnosis. When used by the user, Hypnosis cannot miss.

Ice Shield.name: Ice Shield
Ice Shield.effect: The user places up to 3 segments of Ice Wall; each segment must be continuous with another segment, and at least one must be adjacent to the user. These Ice Walls count as Blocking Terrain and last until the end of the encounter or until they are destroyed. Each Ice Wall segment is 2 meters tall, 1 meter wide, and 2 centimeters thick. Each segment has 10 Hit Points, 5 Damage Reduction, and takes damage as if it was Ice- Type.

Ignition Boost.name: Ignition Boost
Ignition Boost.trigger: An adjacent Ally uses a damaging Fire-Type
Ignition Boost.effect: The allied target gains a +5 Bonus to its damage roll with the triggering Move. A target may not benefit from more than one instance of Ignition Boost at a time.

Illuminate.name: Illuminate
Illuminate.effect: Attacks that target the user have a -2 Accuracy Penalty against the user. Does not affect attackers with the Blindsense Capability. Defensive.

Illusion.name: Illusion
Illusion.effect: As a Standard Action, the user may mark an object, Pokémon, or Trainer. The user may have a number of targets marked equal to their Focus Rank; to mark a new target, an old mark must be forfeited. Once per round as a Free Action, the user may use illusory powers to make itself look exactly like a marked target. This may be done as the user is being released from a Poké Ball. This change is aesthetic and does not affect typing or Moves. The illusion allows the user to vaguely mimic sounds made by its marked target, but it is not capable of intelligible speech. Whenever the user is hit by a damaging Move, the Illusion is destroyed. The user may also dismiss the Illusion as a Free Action.

Immunity.name: Immunity
Immunity.effect: The user cannot be Poisoned or Badly Poisoned. Defensive.

Infiltrator.name: Infiltrator
Infiltrator.effect: The user gains a +2 Bonus to Stealth Checks, does not trigger Hazards, Blessings cannot be activated in response to its actions, and the user may bypass the effects of the move Substitute.

Insomnia.name: Insomnia
Insomnia.effect: The user is immune to the Sleep condition, and cannot use the move Rest. Defensive.

Instinct.name: Instinct
Instinct.effect: The user’s default Evasion is increased by +2. Defensive.

Iron Barbs.name: Iron Barbs
Iron Barbs.trigger: The user is hit by a damaging Melee Attack
Iron Barbs.effect: The attacker loses Hit Points equal to  Tick of Hit Points.

Iron Fist.name: Iron Fist
Iron Fist.effect: The user increases the Damage Base of the following Moves by +2; Bullet Punch, Comet Punch, Dizzy Punch, Drain Punch, Dynamic Punch, Fire Punch, Meteor Mash, Shadow Punch, Ice Punch, Mach Punch, Mega Punch, Sky Uppercut, Thunder Punch, Focus Punch, Hammer Arm, and Power-Up Punch.

Keen Eye.name: Keen Eye
Keen Eye.effect: The user’s Accuracy cannot be lowered, their attacks cannot have Accuracy Penalties (such as from Illuminate), the user is immune to the Blind condition (but not Total Blindness), and the user ignores any Evasion not directly derived from Stats (such as from the Instinct Ability, or from moves like Minimize).

Landslide.name: Landslide
Landslide.effect: The user gains Last Chance with Ground.

Last Chance.name: Last Chance
Last Chance.effect: The user gains Last Chance with Normal.

Leaf Gift.name: Leaf Gift
Leaf Gift.effect: The user is adept at crafting clothes for itself out of common leaves. As an extended action, the user may craft a Leaf Suit listed below by activating this Ability; each suit has different effects on the user. The user may only wear one Leaf Suit at a time; building a new suit destroys previous suits. Nourishing Suit - Effect: Grants the Sun Blanket and Leaf Guard Abilities. Heavy Suit - Effect: Grants the Sturdy and Overcoat Abilities. Vibrant Suit - Effect: Grants the Chlorophyll and Photosynthesis Abilities.

Leek Mastery.name: Leek Mastery
Leek Mastery.effect: Connection - Acrobatics. If the user is holding a Rare Leek, they may still use Acrobatics as if they were not holding an item. The user cannot be disarmed of their Stick, nor can be it be forcefully removed by Trick, Switcheroo, Thief, or any other Moves or effects unless the user wishes it.

Levitate.name: Levitate
Levitate.effect: The Pokémon is immune to the damage and effects of Ground Type Moves, and gains a Levitate Speed of 4, or has existing Levitate Speeds increased by +2. Defensive.

Limber.name: Limber
Limber.effect: The user is immune to Paralysis. Defensive.

Lullaby.name: Lullaby
Lullaby.effect: Connection - Sing. Whenever the user uses the Move “Sing”, they may activate this Feature. The user then picks a Pokémon or Trainer being targeted by Sing; Sing automatically hits that target.

Mach Speed.name: Mach Speed
Mach Speed.effect: The user gains Last Chance with Flying.

Magic Bounce.name: Magic Bounce
Magic Bounce.trigger: The user is hit by a Status Move
Magic Bounce.effect: The user may reflect the Move back to the attacker. This Ability may be used to change the placement and affiliation of any Hazards being set within 10 meters of the user as well. Defensive.

Magic Guard.name: Magic Guard
Magic Guard.effect: The user is immune to damage and Hit Point loss from Hazards, Weather, Status Afflictions, Vortexes, Recoil, Hay Fever, Iron Barbs, Rough Skin, and Leech Seed. Defensive.

Magician.name: Magician
Magician.trigger: The user hits a foe with a damaging Single-
Magician.effect: The user takes the target’s Held Item. This Ability may not be triggered if the user is already holding a Held Item.

Marvel Scale.name: Marvel Scale
Marvel Scale.effect: When Asleep, Paralyzed, Burned, Frozen or Poisoned, Marvel Scale raises the user’s Defense by +2 Combat Stages. The Combat Stages return to normal if the user is cured of their status affliction.

Mimitree.name: Mimitree
Mimitree.effect: Connection - Mimic. Whenever the user uses a Move copied by Mimic, they may choose to replace that Move with Mimic once more. When used this way, the user ignores Mimic’s Frequency.

Mind Mold.name: Mind Mold
Mind Mold.effect: The user gains Last Chance with Psychic.

Mini-Noses.name: Mini-Noses
Mini-Noses.effect: The user detaches up to three Mini-Noses from themselves and places them adjacent to them on the battlefield. These Mini-Noses have HP equal to the user’s level but otherwise uses their user’s stats. Each Mini- Nose has a Levitate Speed of 4. The user may Shift them each round on their turn, and they may originate any Ranged Move from one of the Mini-Noses instead of themselves if they choose. If a Mini-Nose is reduced to 0 HP, it is destroyed and takes a full 24 hours to regrow, one at a time. If the user has less than three grown Mini- Noses, then this ability can only place as many on the field as are available. All Mini-Noses deactivate, but are not destroyed, if the user is Fainted. Mini-Noses cannot be made to Shift more than 5 meters away from the user; if they are forced farther away, they will automatically Shift toward the user on the user’s turn.

Miracle Mile.name: Miracle Mile
Miracle Mile.effect: The user gains Last Chance with Fairy.

Mojo.name: Mojo
Mojo.effect: Normal Types are not immune to the user’s Ghost-Type Moves.

Mold Breaker.name: Mold Breaker
Mold Breaker.effect: The user ignores the effect of enemies’ Defensive Abilities.

Motor Drive.name: Motor Drive
Motor Drive.effect: The user is immune to the damage and effects of Electric Type attacks. Whenever an Electric Type attack hits the Pokémon, raise their Speed by +1 Combat Stage. Defensive.

Mountain Peak.name: Mountain Peak
Mountain Peak.effect: The user gains Last Chance with Rock.

Moxie.name: Moxie
Moxie.effect: Whenever the user’s Move causes a target to faint, it may raise its Attack Combat Stage by +1. You may only trigger Moxie once per Move, even if the Move causes multiple targets to faint.

Mud Dweller.name: Mud Dweller
Mud Dweller.effect: The user resists Ground-Type and Water-Type attacks one step further.

Multitype.name: Multitype
Multitype.effect: The user changes its Elemental Type to any of the Elemental Types. Multitype cannot be copied or disabled.

Natural Cure.name: Natural Cure
Natural Cure.effect: Whenever the user is returned to its Poké Ball or Takes A Breather, it may activate Natural Cure to cure itself of all Persistent Status Afflictions.

Oblivious.name: Oblivious
Oblivious.effect: The user is immune to the Enraged and Infatuated conditions. Defensive.

Omen.name: Omen
Omen.effect: Choose a Pokémon or Trainer within 5 meters. The target’s Accuracy is lowered by 2.

Overcharge.name: Overcharge
Overcharge.effect: The user gains Last Chance with Electric.

Overcoat.name: Overcoat
Overcoat.effect: The user is immune to Moves with the Powder Keyword, and does not take damage from any Weather that would normally cause it to take damage. Defensive.

Overgrow.name: Overgrow
Overgrow.effect: The user gains Last Chance with Grass.

Own Tempo.name: Own Tempo
Own Tempo.effect: The user is immune to Confusion. Defensive.

Pack Hunt.name: Pack Hunt
Pack Hunt.trigger: An adjacent foe is damaged by an ally’s Melee
Pack Hunt.effect: The user may make a Physical Attack with an AC of 5 against the triggering foe. If the attack hits, the foe loses a Tick of Hit Points.

Parental Bond.name: Parental Bond
